name: Zakat Season Reminder
description: During Ramadan and Dhul Hijjah, reminds sales reps to approach high-value contacts about charitable giving partnerships and Zakat-eligible products/services.
descriptionAr: خلال رمضان وذي الحجة، يذكّر مندوبي المبيعات بالتواصل مع العملاء الرئيسيين حول شراكات العطاء الخيري والمنتجات المؤهلة للزكاة.

config.title: Zakat season outreach: {{contact.name}}
config.description: Zakat season is active. Consider reaching out about charitable partnerships or Zakat-eligible offerings.
